attributes.mlflow.spanInputs: {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Great! How do I log a trained model so I can deploy it later?"}]}
attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs:
{"choices": [{"message": {"role": "assistant", "content": "After training, log your model with the appropriate flavor:

```python
# For scikit-learn
mlflow.sklearn.log_model(model, 'model')

# For PyTorch
mlflow.pytorch.log_model(model, 'model')
```

The model is saved with your run and can be loaded later with:
`mlflow.sklearn.load_model('runs:/<run_id>/model')`

Ready to register it for deployment?"}}]}
